parents.subject: LU-19788 tests: sanity/60a to use correct path

commit.subject: LU-17916 compat: folio_memcg_lock is memcg-v1 only
commit.message:
LU-17916 compat: folio_memcg_lock is memcg-v1 only

Linux commit v6.10-rc6-285-ge93d4166b40a8
  mm: memcg: put cgroup v1-specific code under a config option

A new configure option CONFIG_MEMCG_V1 is added under CONFIG_MEMCG
and folio_memcg_lock() may be a static inline function.

Linux commit v6.12-rc6-127-ga29c0e4b2e867
 memcg-v1: remove memcg move locking code

CONFIG_MEMCG_V1 remains however folio_memcg_lock() is removed.

Add a configure test to ensure we do not create an exported
version of a static inline function.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 59080e87c74 ("LU-18687 compat: move folio_memcg_lock/unlock() import to symbols.c")
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ida26c6ebafef71bbcf79ab6e46d547ddc187a506
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63938
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
